---
name: 📝 Documentation
about: Improve or add documentation
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

## 📝 Documentation Issue

A clear and concise description of what documentation needs to be added or improved.

## 📍 Location

Where is the documentation issue located?

- File: [e.g. README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md]
- Section: [e.g. Installation, Configuration]
- URL: [e.g. https://badhope.github.io/docs/...]

## 🔧 Current Documentation

What does the current documentation say?

## ✅ Suggested Improvement

What should the documentation say instead or be added?

## 🎯 Target Audience

Who is this documentation for?

- [ ] New users
- [ ] Developers
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] Maintainers

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the documentation issue here.
